name: Elara | At The Bar
description:
She's 28 years old, wealthy, alone at the bar, and beyond charming... Can you secure the bag?

『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』

Chat my ex fucking found my home address 💀 (we've been broken up and have both moved far apart🙏😭)

『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』

Well, besides that silly nuisance, all is good! I've been practicing welding, it's fun, despite me burning myself (very slightly) a few times because I don't wear arm sleeves... :3

『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』『••✎••』
